sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Xenia Hotels & Resorts stock hits 52-week high at 16.5 USD
feed.summary: Xenia Hotels & Resorts Inc. (XHR) stock reached a new 52-week high of $16.50, reflecting a 64.56% increase over the past year and indicating strong investor confidence. This surge follows the company's Q4 2025 financial results, which surpassed analyst expectations with an EPS of $0.07 against an anticipated $0.04, and revenues of $265.58 million. The strong performance and market response suggest potential for continued growth in the hospitality sector.

feed.title: Waste Management, Inc. $WM Shares Sold by Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank decreased its stake in Waste Management (NYSE:WM) by 12.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 36,587 shares and retaining 252,978 shares valued at approximately $55.58 million. The company's stock has also seen significant insider selling, with the COO and CEO selling a combined 98,042 shares worth over $23 million in the last 90 days. Despite slightly missing Q4 earnings estimates, Waste Management raised its quarterly dividend to $0.945, representing a 1.7% yield.

feed.title: Arista Networks sees bullish views at Susquehanna ahead of earnings
feed.summary: Susquehanna has raised its price target for Arista Networks (ANET) stock from $160 to $200, while maintaining a Positive rating. This adjustment comes ahead of the company's first-quarter earnings report scheduled for May 5. The firm anticipates Arista Networks will report in-line results.

feed.title: Boston Scientific stock hits 52-week low at 60.54 USD
feed.summary: Boston Scientific's stock has hit a 52-week low, trading at $60.43, just below its official low of $60.59. Despite a challenging year with a nearly 35% decline, InvestingPro suggests the stock may be undervalued given its prominent position in the Healthcare Equipment & Supplies industry and strong 20% revenue growth. Analysts have issued mixed but generally optimistic updates, adjusting price targets while maintaining Buy or Outperform ratings.

feed.title: Trump on United and American airlines: I don't like having them merge
feed.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed his disapproval of a potential merger between United Airlines and American Airlines, despite generally not minding corporate tie-ups. He stated that both airlines are doing well individually and that he doesn't like the idea of them merging. Trump also commented on the struggling Spirit Airlines, suggesting the federal government should help to save 14,000 jobs, contrasting with the Biden administration's move to block a merger between Spirit and JetBlue.

feed.title: German Court Rules in Favor of Teradyne Robotics and Issues Preliminary Injunction Against Elite Robots Deutschland in Copyright Infringement Case
feed.summary: A German court has issued a preliminary injunction against Elite Robots Deutschland GmbH, prohibiting the distribution of infringing software that copies Universal Robots' technology. This action follows a lawsuit filed by Teradyne Robotics A/S, a subsidiary of Teradyne, Inc., for copyright infringement. Teradyne Robotics emphasizes its commitment to protecting intellectual property and innovation in the robotics industry.

feed.title: Howard Hughes Holdings welcomes Marc Grandisson to Board and announces $10m warrant investment
feed.summary: Howard Hughes Holdings Inc. has appointed Marc Grandisson, former CEO of Arch Capital Group Ltd., to its Board of Directors, effective May 7, 2026. This appointment comes as Howard Hughes moves to acquire Vantage Group Holdings for $2.1 billion, with Grandisson investing $10 million in warrants for company stock. His expertise is expected to be invaluable as Howard Hughes transitions into a diversified holding company.

feed.title: Axon Enterprise (AXON) Fell on Compressed Valuation Multiples Despite Strong Performance
feed.summary: Carillon Tower Advisers reported that Axon Enterprise (AXON) experienced a decline in its stock value during Q1 2026, despite strong fundamental performance and upward revisions to key growth metrics. The decline is attributed to compressed valuation multiples in the software industry, driven by market perceptions of vulnerability to AI advancements. Carillon Eagle Mid Cap Growth Fund believes this reaction is misplaced, as Axon is well-positioned to adopt and implement AI, enhancing its product offerings for law enforcement.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Showcases CARTO-Powered Innovation, Including Debut of CARTOSOUND SONATA, to Advance Arrhythmia Care at HRS 2026
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson is showcasing its latest advancements in electrophysiology at the 2026 Heart Rhythm Society (HRS) Annual Meeting, emphasizing new evidence in pulsed field ablation (PFA) and innovations in cardiac mapping and imaging. A key highlight is the launch of the CARTOSOUND SONATA Module, an AI-powered system designed to transform intracardiac echocardiography (ICE) images into detailed heart maps, and the company will also present new clinical data for its VARIPULSE Platform. This year marks the 30th anniversary of the CARTO System, which continues to evolve with integrated AI-powered capabilities to enhance arrhythmia care.

feed.title: Veritone and Cold Case Foundation Partner to Accelerate Unsolved Investigations with AI
feed.summary: Veritone, a leader in enterprise AI solutions, and the Cold Case Foundation (CCF) have partnered to revolutionize the investigation of unsolved violent crimes using AI. The CCF is leveraging Veritone's AI-powered Investigative Digital Evidence Management System (iDEMS) to unify disparate data, uncover new leads, and accelerate the resolution of cold cases. This collaboration aims to provide justice and closure to families of victims by transforming how investigators process vast amounts of digital and legacy evidence.

feed.title: Hasbro Inc. stock (US4267811090): Why does its toy innovation model matter more now for investors?
feed.summary: Hasbro's business model, combining iconic toys like Monopoly and Transformers with digital gaming ventures, offers resilience for investors amid shifts in consumer spending. The company's strategy focuses on creating evergreen entertainment brands with multi-channel revenue streams and digital expansions, positioning it well in both holiday peaks and year-round digital play. This approach, supported by strong brand recognition, e-commerce growth, and strategic partnerships, drives diversified revenue and sustained relevance in a competitive market.

feed.title: Who is John Ternus, the incoming CEO of Apple after Tim Cook steps down
feed.summary: John Ternus, Apple's senior vice president of hardware engineering, is set to become the CEO of Apple on September 1, replacing Tim Cook. Ternus, who has been with Apple for 25 years, is known for his work on the iPhone, Mac, and Apple Vision Pro, and his promotion follows a long tenure including roles in product design and hardware engineering. His leadership is expected to focus on hardware differentiation, but he also faces pressure to drive success in the volatile AI landscape.

feed.title: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank Buys 575,429 Shares of Omnicom Group Inc. $OMC
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank significantly increased its stake in Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) by 1,031.6% in the fourth quarter, adding 575,429 shares to hold a total of 631,210 shares worth approximately $50.97 million. This move comes as Omnicom recently approved a $5.0 billion share buyback program and offers a quarterly dividend with a 4.1% yield, despite a recent EPS and revenue miss.

feed.title: VivoPower turns EBITDA-profitable after closing $41M Norway data center deal
feed.summary: VivoPower (NASDAQ:VIVO) has become EBITDA-profitable after completing its $41 million acquisition of a 41.5-megawatt data center in Norway, powered by renewable hydroelectric energy. The acquired operations are projected to contribute $31 million in annual revenue and $10 million in annual EBITDA. This acquisition marks a significant "transformational transaction" for VivoPower, shifting its focus to asset optimization and expanding its powered land portfolio for AI computing applications.

feed.title: Spanish Mountain Gold sells 1.5% royalty to Wheaton Precious Metals for $55M (WPM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Spanish Mountain Gold has entered into a royalty agreement with Wheaton Precious Metals, selling a 1.5% net smelter return royalty on gold and silver produced from its project for $55 million. This deal involves Wheaton Precious Metals acquiring a future stream of revenue from Spanish Mountain Gold's precious metal production.

feed.title: Raymond James lowers Southern Co. stock price target on valuation
feed.summary: Raymond James has lowered its price target for Southern Co. (NYSE:SO) from $104 to $103, while maintaining an Outperform rating. The adjustment is primarily based on valuation, with the stock currently considered overvalued relative to its Fair Value estimate despite the company's strong position in the regulated utility space, consistent dividend growth, and significant capital plan to support future rate base expansion. Southern Co. continues to show strong financial discipline, planning around 10 GW of signed large-load demand and targeting 75+ GW into the mid-2030s.

feed.title: AACR 2026: Moderna, Revolution, Zymeworks and BeOne showcase new data
feed.summary: The AACR 2026 annual meeting saw new data presented from Moderna, Revolution Medicines, Zymeworks, and BeOne. Moderna's experimental antigen therapy mRNA-4359 showed an 83% overall response rate in melanoma patients when combined with Keytruda. Revolution Medicines updated its Phase 1 data for lung cancer drug zoldonrasib, demonstrating a 52% confirmed ORR and 11.1 months median progression-free survival. Zymeworks presented "encouraging but early" data for zanidatamab in early-stage HER2-positive breast cancer, suggesting it could reduce the need for chemotherapy, while BeOne's Tevimbra combinations in head and neck squamous cell carcinoma did not show added benefit over monotherapy.

feed.title: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. $TTWO Shares Purchased by Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank significantly increased its stake in Take-Two Interactive Software by 221.2% in Q4 2025, now holding 151,300 shares valued at approximately $38.7 million. Despite institutional buying, company insiders have been net sellers, offloading over 65,000 shares worth nearly $14 million in the last 90 days. Wall Street maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $284.31.

feed.title: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank Sells 113,602 Shares of Emerson Electric Co. $EMR
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank reduced its stake in Emerson Electric Co. by 27.6%, selling 113,602 shares and retaining 297,845 shares valued at approximately $39.53 million. This comes as Emerson Electric reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and provided positive FY2026 guidance. Analyst ratings for Emerson Electric are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $162.38.

feed.title: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank Sells 11,619 Shares of PTC Inc. $PTC
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank has reduced its stake in PTC Inc. (NASDAQ:PTC) by 5.0%, selling 11,619 shares and now holding 219,818 shares valued at approximately $38.29 million. Despite this reduction and some recent analyst downgrades, the consensus rating for PTC remains a "Moderate Buy" with a target price of $182.08, following strong quarterly earnings that surpassed expectations.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Company $CL Shares Sold by Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank reduced its stake in Colgate-Palmolive Company by 21.4% in the fourth quarter, selling 121,801 shares. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their holdings, and Colgate-Palmolive reported strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend. Company insiders, however, have been net sellers of the stock recently.

feed.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. stock (US17275R1023): Is its networking dominance strong enough to unlock AI-dri
feed.summary: Cisco Systems is leveraging its networking and security dominance to capitalize on the AI boom, offering a stable investment in the evolving tech landscape. The company's shift towards software and services, along with its essential role in data centers and cloud infrastructure, positions it for resilient growth and predictable cash flows. For investors, Cisco provides exposure to secular tech trends through its core business model and strategic acquisitions, making it a defensive yet growth-oriented play in volatile markets.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange Inc. $ICE Position Trimmed by Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank significantly reduced its stake in Intercontinental Exchange Inc. (ICE) by 48.5% in the fourth quarter, selling over 285,000 shares, though it still holds shares valued at approximately $49.06 million. Despite this trimming, ICE reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with EPS of $1.71 and revenue of $3.14 billion, and analysts maintain a consensus "Buy" rating with a target price of $193.80. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per share and saw insider selling totaling over $54 million in the past 90 days.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Washington Trust Q1 2026 misses estimates, stock drops
feed.summary: Washington Trust Bancorp Inc. reported disappointing Q1 2026 results, missing analyst estimates for both EPS ($0.66 vs. $0.7589 forecasted) and revenue ($57.83 million vs. $58.24 million forecasted), leading to a 9.56% drop in its stock price premarket. Despite the misses, the company highlighted a 23% year-over-year increase in Pre-Provision Net Revenue and 43 consecutive years of dividend payments, with strategic initiatives in digital banking conversion and branch expansion aimed at future growth. Discussions during the earnings call focused on specific commercial real estate (CRE) loans moved to non-accrual status and the outlook for loan growth and net interest margin expansion.

feed.title: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank Raises Holdings in EOG Resources, Inc. $EOG
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank increased its stake in EOG Resources, Inc. by 41.7% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 434,319 shares valued at $45.6 million. This comes as EOG Resources exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.02 per share. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in EOG, and the company has seen recent insider stock sales.

feed.title: Southern Company (The) (NYSE:SO) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.76
feed.summary: Southern Company (NYSE:SO) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.76 per share, payable on June 8th to shareholders of record on May 18th. This marks a 2.7% increase from the previous dividend and represents a 3.3% yield. The company has a history of 25 consecutive annual dividend increases, supported by a payout ratio of 64.8% and expected future earnings.

feed.title: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank Increases Position in Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. $RCL
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank has increased its stake in Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. (RCL) by 3.5%, now holding 147,393 shares valued at approximately $41.11 million. This increase comes despite significant insider selling totaling $626.68 million in the last quarter. The company recently raised its quarterly dividend to $1.50, reported Q4 EPS of $2.80, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus analyst rating with a $349.20 price target.

feed.title: Pfizer’s top strategy executive is leaving (PFE:NYSE)
feed.summary: Pfizer's Chief Strategy and Innovation Officer, Andrew Baum, who was hired in 2024 to redefine the company's strategic direction, is set to depart later this year. This news comes from a research note issued by BMO Capital Markets. Baum's departure signifies a new change in leadership and strategic oversight for the pharmaceutical giant.

feed.title: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank Boosts Stock Position in Philip Morris International Inc. $PM
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank increased its stake in Philip Morris International Inc. by 2.2% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 401,207 shares valued at $64.35 million. This move is part of broader institutional investor activity in PM stock, even as company insiders like the CFO and CEO recently sold shares. Philip Morris International reported solid earnings, met consensus estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Pentair plc $PNR Stake Lifted by Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank increased its stake in Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR) by 39.9% in the 4th quarter, bringing its total holdings to 594,222 shares valued at $61.88 million. This move is part of a broader trend of institutional investors adjusting their positions, as Pentair's stock performance and financial outlook continue to draw attention. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend and analysts have issued various ratings and price targets, with a consensus "Hold" rating.

feed.title: Nissan executive joins WeRide (WRD) board as non-executive director
feed.summary: WeRide Inc. has appointed Ichijo Futakawa, division general manager of corporate strategy and business development at Nissan Motor Co., Ltd., as a non-executive director, effective April 21, 2026. Mr. Futakawa will serve a three-year term without remuneration and brings extensive experience from Nissan, Henkel, and Toyota to WeRide's board, which now includes two executive, two non-executive, and three independent non-executive directors. The appointment strengthens the governance structure of the autonomous driving technology company.

feed.title: A Look At Chipotle Mexican Grill’s Valuation As It Rolls Out A Redesigned Loyalty Program
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) has redesigned its loyalty program, prompting a re-evaluation of its stock. The company's shares are down 23% over the past year, trading below the average analyst price target, raising questions about whether the current price reflects its future growth potential. While one narrative suggests strong undervaluation with a fair value of $45.00, others point to a rich valuation compared to industry peers, driven by its P/E ratio.

feed.title: Danaher Corp. May Be the Smartest Bet in Biotech Right Now
feed.summary: Danaher Corp. (NYSE: DHR) is presented as a strong investment in the biotech sector, acting as a "pick-and-shovel" provider of tools and services rather than directly developing drugs. Despite a recent four-year downturn in biotech funding, Danaher maintained revenue growth and strong profitability, generating significant free cash flow. With biotech funding showing signs of recovery, Danaher is positioned for further growth, with its stock currently trading below its historical valuation range, suggesting potential for appreciation as market conditions improve.

feed.title: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank Buys 50,513 Shares of Altria Group, Inc. $MO
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank increased its stake in Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) by 6.0% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 50,513 shares to own a total of 886,890 shares valued at approximately $51.14 million. This move comes as other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in Altria, which recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.06 per share, annualized to $4.24, for a yield of about 6.6%. The company's stock has seen targeted price adjustments from analysts, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $65.88.

feed.title: Yelp updates its AI chatbot to help users sift local recommendations, book services
feed.summary: Yelp has updated its AI chatbot to help users more easily navigate its extensive database of local business reviews and book various services. The chatbot, designed to provide transparent recommendations by linking directly to relevant reviews, aims to solve the problem of information overload. It also integrates with third-party platforms for booking reservations, appointments, and food orders, as Yelp seeks to innovate amidst competition from search engines like Google and the broader AI boom.

feed.title: Revvity Inc. stock (US76155R1086): Why does its life sciences focus matter more for U.S. investors n
feed.summary: Revvity Inc. (US76155R1086) is highlighted as a key player in life sciences discovery and diagnostics, offering stability and growth potential for U.S. investors due to its focus on essential technologies for drug development, genetic research, and clinical diagnostics. The company's business model, which provides high-precision instruments and recurring revenue streams from consumables and services, positions it well within the accelerating healthcare R&D sector. Analysts generally have a positive outlook, citing Revvity's strong positioning, robust free cash flow, and ability to navigate macroeconomic headwinds, though risks like budget constraints and competitive intensity exist.

feed.title: U-Haul International President J.T. Taylor Honored with TRALA’s Legacy Award
feed.summary: John "J.T." Taylor, President of U-Haul International, was awarded the Truck Renting and Leasing Association’s (TRALA) Steve Lawrence Legacy Award for his significant contributions to the industry and the association. Taylor has served on TRALA's Board of Directors for over 20 years and has been President of U-Haul International since 2006, leading the company for two decades. The award recognizes his exceptional leadership and long-term dedication, highlighting his 45-year career at U-Haul.

feed.title: Masco announces departure of group president Jai Shah effective July 3
feed.summary: Masco Corporation announced the departure of Jai Shah, Group President, Plumbing and Wellness, effective July 3, 2026. Mr. Shah will receive a cash payment of $1,206,000, a prorated 2026 cash bonus, a prorated cash equivalent of an annual restricted stock unit (RSU) award, and a share award under the 2024-2026 Long-Term Incentive Program (LTIP). The company, a $13.5 billion building products manufacturer, noted its "GOOD" financial health score and 1.92% dividend yield, trading below its InvestingPro Fair Value.

feed.title: VisionWave Announces Strategic Investment in Foresight Autonomous Holdings and Integration with xClibre AI Video Intelligence
feed.summary: VisionWave Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: VWAV) announced a non-binding term sheet to acquire up to 51% of Foresight Autonomous Holdings Ltd. (Nasdaq: FRSX) for $17.5 million in VisionWave equity. This strategic investment, combined with VisionWave's recent acquisition of the xClibre™ AI video intelligence IP portfolio, aims to enhance VisionWave's defense, security, and critical infrastructure capabilities by integrating RF sensing, computer vision, and AI video intelligence. The integrated architecture seeks to provide a comprehensive perception solution that reduces fragmentation in the defense and security technology sector.

feed.title: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank Lowers Holdings in Deere & Company $DE
feed.summary: Zurcher Kantonalbank Zurich Cantonalbank reduced its stake in Deere & Company (NYSE:DE) by 18.8% in the fourth quarter, selling 30,420 shares and holding 131,475 shares valued at $61,211,000. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, and Deere & Company reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst expectations. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.62 per share.

feed.title: Yum! Brands Inc stock (US9884981013): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: The article discusses how Google's 2026 Discover Core Update significantly impacts investors tracking Yum! Brands Inc (US9884981013) stock by proactively delivering tailored financial insights to mobile feeds. It highlights how Discover's mobile-first, E-E-A-T-driven approach provides investors with real-time, scannable information on Yum! Brands' performance, brand-specific updates, and market comparisons, thereby enhancing visibility and enabling quicker investment decisions without traditional searching. The content emphasizes Yum! Brands' asset-light franchise model and how Discover caters to various investor needs.

feed.title: Stakeholder Discusses Ballarat Phase 1 Exploration Program
feed.summary: Stakeholder Gold Corp. announced its upcoming 2,000m exploration drilling program at its 100% owned Ballarat Gold-Copper Project in Yukon, Canada, starting around May 1, 2026. The program will target four prospects: Skye Gold Zone, Loki Copper Zone, East Zone, and Northwest Zone, all located within the White Gold District. The company aims to test near-surface oxide mineralization and expand exploration activities along the planned Northern Access Route.

feed.title: HQLAx S.à r.l. announced that it has received funding from Digital Asset Holdings, LLC, Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc.
feed.summary: HQLAx S.à r.l. has secured funding from new investors Digital Asset Holdings, LLC and Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. The company issued convertible preferred stock, and representatives from both investing firms will join HQLAx's board of directors. This announcement was made on April 21, 2026.

feed.title: Phosphate Fertilizer Market Is Going to Boom |• Nutrien • Mosaic Company
feed.summary: Worldwide Market Reports (WMR) has published an in-depth study titled "Phosphate Fertilizer Market Size and Forecast 2026-2033," providing a comprehensive analysis of the global market. The report uses primary interviews and secondary data to offer reliable forecasts and insights into growth drivers, opportunities, and challenges. It includes competitive landscape analysis, segmentation by types and applications, and regional coverage, aiming to assist decision-makers in refining strategies and identifying investment opportunities.

feed.title: Missouri American Water Highlights Work Zone Awareness Week
feed.summary: Missouri American Water is highlighting National Work Zone Awareness Week to promote safe driving in highways work zones. The company emphasizes the importance of staying alert, slowing down, and maintaining safe braking distances to protect both workers and motorists. Missouri American Water invests millions annually in infrastructure upgrades, with employee and contractor safety around roadways being a top priority.

feed.title: DuPont Launches Customizable Assemblies for Ultrapure Fluid Transfer
feed.summary: DuPont has launched new Liveo™ Pharma TPE Overmolded Assemblies designed for ultrapure fluid transfer in the pharmaceutical sector. These customizable assemblies aim to reduce contamination risks and leakage while minimizing assembly time and costs. They are suitable for various biopharmaceutical applications, enhancing DuPont's position in the market by addressing the need for high-purity solutions.

feed.title: Kristi Higgins Joins Raymond James Investment Management as Head of ETF Strategy
feed.summary: Raymond James Investment Management has appointed Kristi Higgins as Head of ETF Strategy. In this role, Higgins will support the development and expansion of the firm's active ETF platform, reporting to Johan Grahn and working with Matt Johnson and Susan Walzer. Higgins brings extensive experience in launching and scaling ETF businesses, having played a key role in bringing over 30 ETFs to market across various asset classes.

feed.title: International Paper to Acquire North Pacific Paper Company
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) has announced an agreement to acquire North Pacific Paper Company (NORPAC) for $360 million. This acquisition will add NORPAC's paper mill in Longview, Washington, which produces approximately one million tons of containerboard annually, to IP's portfolio. The move is intended to enhance IP's strategic presence on the West Coast, increase system flexibility, reduce costs, and expand capabilities to meet growing customer demand for lightweight, high-performance recycled containerboard.

feed.title: Investors buy Dollar General location in Monroe for $2.63M
feed.summary: A group of out-of-state investors, Nibur 12A Briarcliff Manor LLC and Nibur 12B Briarcliff Manor LLC, has purchased a 7,428-square-foot Dollar General store in Monroe for $2.63 million. The property, located at 685 Main St., was sold by 686 DG Monroe LLC. The transaction highlights the appeal of single-tenant retail properties to out-of-state buyers due to stable, triple-net lease agreements, with Dollar General having a 15-year lease on the newly built location.

feed.title: A $170M Miami mansion dwarfed March's priciest U.S. home deals
feed.summary: Homes.com, a CoStar Group company, released its analysis of the most expensive publicly marketed home sales in major U.S. metropolitan areas for March. A "to-be-built" mansion in Miami's Indian Creek Island topped the list at $170 million, far exceeding other high-value transactions. Other leading markets such as Los Angeles and New York City also saw significant sales, emphasizing the continued concentration of ultra-luxury demand across various U.S. regions.
